title: codereview: coap_dtn.c skeleton must follow no-comment rule and use SenML+OSCORE patterns from coap_location.c and coap_oscore.c
description: New file must have no comments per code style. Use SENML_CBOR_CONTENT_FORMAT=112, integrate with lichen_dtn_buffer from routing, handle OSCORE via coap_oscore helpers, rate limiting with k_timer or atomic. Must match test/vectors/deaddrop.json exactly. Per spec 12-apps.md:18.9 and 11-lci.md:17.5.8. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: explored coap_dtn rpl CCP-channel-sync Rust/Python/Zephyr; precise edits no comments/statics/bounds/LICHEN_prefix; verified cargo test pytest west+clippy ruff no test mods; closed
